pos.label: POS Terminal
pos.changelog: Fix bill double-print — settle no longer prints a second copy when Print Bill was clicked just before

captain.label: Captain App
captain.changelog: Fix merge/transfer sync — freed table clears properly on POS; secondary actions now show as single-line list

kds.label: Kitchen Display
kds.changelog: Coloured source stripe, table-first card header, highlighted item notes, large-screen support for Android TV and 21-50" monitors

ownerWeb.label: Owner Dashboard
ownerWeb.changelog: App Store download page, update notifications

tabletPos.label: Tablet POS
tabletPos.changelog: Fix bill double-print — Print Bill now prints immediately; Settle only auto-prints if Print Bill was skipped
